title: Commerce Price Monitor
description: Find public product pages, extract product details, and detect price or availability changes.

start_urls.title: Store or category URLs
start_urls.description: Store home pages, collection pages, category pages, or direct product URLs.

url.title: URL
url.description: Store, category, collection, or product page URL to start crawling from.

max_products.title: Max products
max_products.description: Hard limit for product records saved.

max_depth.title: Max crawl depth
max_depth.description: How many link levels to follow from each start URL.

same_domain_only.title: Same domain only
same_domain_only.description: Only follow links on the same domain as the start URLs.

product_url_patterns.title: Product URL patterns
product_url_patterns.description: URL fragments that usually identify product pages.

include_patterns.title: Include URL patterns
include_patterns.description: Optional regex patterns URLs must match.

price_selectors.title: Price selectors
price_selectors.description: Optional CSS selectors for price text.

title_selectors.title: Title selectors
title_selectors.description: Optional CSS selectors for product title.

capture_screenshots.title: Capture screenshots (legacy)
capture_screenshots.description: Save product page screenshots to the key-value store. Superseded by takeScreenshots.

takeScreenshots.title: Take screenshots
takeScreenshots.description: Save product page screenshots to the key-value store. Overrides the legacy capture_screenshots option.

screenshotOnChangeOnly.title: Screenshot on change only
screenshotOnChangeOnly.description: Only capture a screenshot when a price or availability change is detected.

screenshotOnFailure.title: Screenshot on failure
screenshotOnFailure.description: Capture a screenshot when a page scan fails.

detect_changes.title: Detect changes
detect_changes.description: Compare price, availability, and content hash with the previous run.

snapshot_store_name.title: Snapshot store name (deprecated)
snapshot_store_name.description: No longer used. The Actor always uses the default key-value store with prefixed keys.

timeoutSecs.title: Page timeout (seconds)
timeoutSecs.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a page to load before failing.

maxRetries.title: Max retries per page
maxRetries.description: Number of times to retry a page load on failure, with exponential backoff.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of pages to scan simultaneously.

minChangePercent.title: Minimum price change percent
minChangePercent.description: Minimum absolute percentage change required to flag a price as changed. Use 0 to flag any change.

wait_ms.title: Wait after load
wait_ms.description: Extra wait before extracting product data.
